kind: 2D monospace glyph grid — NOT a 3D model, mesh, depth map, or projected planes.

pseudoDepth.mechanism: Per-cell density value derived from the glyph itself via the DENS ramp (CHARACTER_PALETTE.json). This density (0..1) is treated as a free depth map.
pseudoDepth.parallaxOffsetX: px += (density - 0.5) * 30 * sin(t*0.55)   // A = 30px, t in seconds
pseudoDepth.honesty: There is no perspective distance, camera, FOV, near/far plane, or per-part (stem/bell/leaf) rig. 'Pseudo-3D' is entirely the density→horizontal-parallax + rolling-light illusion over the flat art. See ascii-motion-doctrine §1 and §6 (trademark honesty).

perCellDrawGeometry.cw: ch * 0.6, clamped so cw*cols <= viewportW * wFrac  (wFrac = 0.28)
perCellDrawGeometry.cellCenter: px = originX + x*cw + cw/2 ; py = originY + y*ch + ch/2
perCellDrawGeometry.fieldWave: wv = sin(px*0.011 + t*1.2) + sin(py*0.013 - t*0.9) ; glyph drawn at py + wv*2.4
